author: Billy Banks (aka Billy Tucker-Robinson), Sovereign Founder
purpose: Establish the closed-loop system that governs learning, simulation, currency issuance, business creation, treasury formation, and sovereign graduation inside PulseWorld. No spawn may skip the cycle. No currency may enter circulation outside the laws of learning, proof, and treasury readiness.
canonical_loop: Convert credits to real currency power

pulsecredits_law.creation: Only through learning or building value
pulsecredits_law.function: Simulates labor, study, innovation, and contribution

actions: Use PC to enter simulation missions
simulation_business_layer.business_validation: Must prove stability, repeatability, and value creation
simulation_business_layer.treasury_contribution: Only verified businesses contribute to shared treasury

trigger_conditions: 1 full quarterly business cycle is logged
paypal_treasury_phase.purpose: Proves real-world viability and seeds PulseCoin liquidity

graduation_trigger.pulsecoin_unlock: Triggered only when graduates exist AND treasury threshold is reached

pulsecoin_law.launch_condition: World must prove it can sustain it

benefits: Ensures value is tied to effort

infinite_education_clause.reentry: Graduates may re-enter college unlimited times
benefits: More PulseCredits = more PulseCoin at burn stage
infinite_education_clause.expansion: New courses, industries, and partners continuously unlock

governance.senate: Controls emission, scarcity, and graduation rules
governance.judiciary: Enforces penalties, fraud detection, and ritual validation
governance.autopilot: Monitors treasury health and rotates curriculum
governance.ritual_chamber: Validates ceremonial burns and prestige ascensions
governance.treasury_council: Manages recycled coin flows and grant approvals

outcomes: Every spawn becomes a business-building, currency-stabilizing agent
PulseWorld becomes the first self-governing digital economy

binding_statement: This doctrine cannot be broken, bypassed, or ignored. PulseWorld thrives through education → simulation → business → treasury → currency, in that sacred order.

status.activation_log: [EDU-ECON LOOP] Education–Economy Loop Doctrine v2.0 Activated
status.version_notes: Final enactment of the sovereign education–currency–treasury cycle, authored and proclaimed by Billy Banks.
